# classificationResponse(for:)

**Instance Method**

Notifies the view controller when the user finishes entering data and presses the Done button.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func classificationResponse(for request: ILClassificationRequest) -> ILClassificationResponse
```

## Collecting Data from the User

- **prepare(for:)**: Notifies the view controller just before the system presents it to the user.
